themes.name: Sovereignty
themes.vision: The platform has zero dependency on any cloud provider, proprietary service, or single-vendor project that could change terms, revoke access, or alter the roadmap.
successCriteria: All platform components use permissive-licensed (Apache 2.0/MIT/BSD), foundation-governed software
Platform runs on any bare-metal or VPS without a cloud provider account
No data leaves the cluster without explicit operator configuration
Any component whose upstream changes license is replaced within one sprint
themes.notes: The Vault→OpenBao migration is the reference precedent for this theme.

themes.name: Zero Trust
themes.vision: No implicit trust exists anywhere on the platform — every connection is authenticated, encrypted, and authorized by policy.
successCriteria: All service-to-service traffic uses mTLS (Istio STRICT mode)
All namespaces have deny-all NetworkPolicy with explicit allow rules
All workloads are subject to OPA/Gatekeeper policy enforcement
Runtime anomalies are detected and logged (Falco)
All container images are scanned for vulnerabilities before admission (Trivy)

themes.name: Developer Autonomy
themes.vision: A developer can clone this repo, fill in a config file, and have a complete production-grade platform running in under 30 minutes — with no cloud account required for local development.
successCriteria: kind-based local cluster spins up in under 5 minutes with ./kind/setup.sh
All charts install cleanly into kind for local development
Backstage service catalog auto-discovers all platform services
Browser-based IDE (code-server) gives agents a full development environment
GitLab + ArgoCD provide complete GitOps workflow without GitHub dependency

themes.name: Observability
themes.vision: Every signal from every component is captured, correlated, and queryable — metrics, logs, traces, and security events — with no data leaving the cluster.
successCriteria: Prometheus scrapes all platform components with <15s staleness
All logs flow to Loki and are queryable in Grafana
Distributed traces connect across all services via Tempo + OpenTelemetry
Long-term metric retention via Thanos (90 days minimum)
Falco security events appear in Grafana alongside application metrics

themes.name: Resilience
themes.vision: The platform survives node failures, upgrades, and deliberate chaos without data loss or unplanned downtime.
successCriteria: All platform components have PodDisruptionBudgets and podAntiAffinity
Loss of any single node does not cause service disruption
All stateful data is backed up daily and restore is tested
Zero-downtime rolling updates via ArgoCD sync waves
Chaos Mesh scenarios run weekly without causing SLO breaches
